back_translation: James, a servant of God and of the Lord Jesus Christ. To the twelve tribes scattered abroad, may joy be with you
My brothers, consider it the highest joy when you encounter various trials
because you know that the testing of your faith produces endurance
And let endurance complete its work fully, so that you may be fully mature and complete, lacking nothing at all
If anyone among you lacks wisdom, let him petition God, who gives to all without hesitation and without reproach, and it will be given to him
But let him petition with faith, doubting nothing at all, because the one who doubts is like a wave of the sea blown by the wind and tossed back and forth
For such a person should not think that he will receive anything from the Lord
He is a person of two minds, unstable in all his ways
But let the lowly brother boast in his exalted position
But let the rich person boast in his lowly position, because he will pass away like a flower in a meadow
For the sun rises with intense heat and makes the meadow wither, its flower falls and the beauty of its face perishes. So too the rich person will wither in the midst of his pursuits
Blessed is the person who endures trial, because when he has passed the test, he will receive the crown of life that God has promised to those who love Him
When tempted, let no one say, “God is tempting me.” For God cannot be tempted to do evil, and He Himself does not tempt anyone at all
But each person is tempted when his own desire pulls him out and lures him
When desire has conceived, it gives birth to sin; and when sin has fully grown, it gives birth to death
My beloved brothers, do not be misled
Every good gift and every perfect present comes from above, descending from the Father of the lights, with whom there is no change or shadow of shifting
He willed and gave us birth through the word of truth, so that we would be like firstfruits of His creation
My beloved brothers, know this: everyone should be quick to listen, slow to speak, slow to anger
for human anger does not produce the righteousness of God
Therefore, get rid of all filth and the abundance of evil, and with humility receive the implanted word, which is able to save your souls
But be those who practice the word, not merely those who listen — otherwise you deceive yourselves
For if anyone listens to the word but does not practice it, such a person is like one who looks at his natural face in a mirror
for when he has looked at himself he walks away, and immediately forgets what he is like
But the one who gazes intently into the perfect law, the law of freedom, and continues in it — not being a hearer who forgets but a doer of work — such a person will be blessed in his doing
If anyone considers himself religious but does not control his tongue, and deceives his own heart, such a person’s religion is worthless
Religion that is pure and undefiled before our God and Father is this: caring for orphans and widows in their distress, and keeping oneself free from defilement by the world
